header.subject: social_studies
header.classification: 6.1 - U.S. History: America in the World

sections.label: Statement
sections.text: Distinguish the roles and responsibilities of the three branches of the national government.

items.label: Standard
items.value: 6.1 - U.S. History: America in the World

sections.label: Core idea
sections.text: Levels of government (i.e., local, state, and federal) have different powers and responsibilities.
